title: Protocol for Culturing and Extracting DNA from Fungal Isolates
author: Temitope R. Folorunso
materials: All reagents were commercially purchased, mixed and modified according to existing protocol Preparation of 1 L of solid 3 % Malt extract agar (MEA) medium
All reagents were commercially purchased, mixed and modified according to existing protocol. Pre-washing of Mycelia
Weigh and measure all reagents according to desired final volume.
Weigh and measure all reagents according to desired final volume, freshly prepared 10 g Polyvinylpyrrolidone (PVP-40) is advisable.
Weigh 15 g of DifcoTM Bacto Agar.
Allow medium to circulate the bottom of plate.
Allow media to circulate the bottom of plate.
Preparation of 1 L Sabouraud dextrose (SD) broth
Needle surface sterilization and fungal culturing
Give it a radial pattern arrangement.
Make triplicate of samples per colony.
Inoculation of pure fungal on liquid broth

steps.title: Incubate for ~ 48:00:00 at 22...
steps.instruction: Incubate for ~ 48:00:00 at 22 °C to confirm no contamination.

steps.title: Allow mixture to be cleared and free of particles
steps.instruction: Allow mixture to be cleared and free of particles.

steps.title: Add a magnetic stirrer and put...
steps.instruction: Add a magnetic stirrer and put on Fisher Thermix Stiring hotplate at 60 °C .

steps.title: Mix all in Erlenmeyer flask 1000 mL (PYREX)
steps.instruction: Mix all in Erlenmeyer flask 1000 mL (PYREX).

steps.title: Measure 1000 mL of distilled water
steps.instruction: Measure 1000 mL of distilled water.

steps.title: Weigh peptone of 5 g (Er et al
steps.instruction: Weigh peptone of 5 g (Er et al., 2015).

steps.title: Use sterilized packs of petri dishes 100 x15 mm (VWR)
steps.instruction: Use sterilized packs of petri dishes 100 x15 mm (VWR).

steps.title: Expose the flow hood to UV light for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Expose the flow hood to UV light for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Clean the Flow hood with conflicts followed by 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Clean the Flow hood with conflicts followed by 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Pour ~ 30 mL media into...
steps.instruction: Pour ~ 30 mL media into the petri dishes under laminar flow hood.

steps.title: Preparation of 1 L of solid...
steps.instruction: Preparation of 1 L of solid Sabouraud dextrose agar (SDA) medium

steps.title: Allow mixture to be cleared and free of particles
steps.instruction: Allow mixture to be cleared and free of particles.

steps.title: Clean the flow hood with conflicts followed by 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Clean the flow hood with conflicts followed by 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Expose the flow hood to UV light for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Expose the flow hood to UV light for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Use sterilized packs of petri dishes 100 x15 mm (VWR)
steps.instruction: Use sterilized packs of petri dishes 100 x15 mm (VWR).

steps.title: Pour ~ 30 mL media into...
steps.instruction: Pour ~ 30 mL media into the petri dishes under laminar flow hood.

steps.title: Incubate for ~ 48:00:00 at 22...
steps.instruction: Incubate for ~ 48:00:00 at 22 °C to confirm no contamination.

steps.title: Measure 1000 mL of distilled water
steps.instruction: Measure 1000 mL of distilled water.

steps.title: Mix all in Erlenmeyer flask 1000 mL (PYREX)
steps.instruction: Mix all in Erlenmeyer flask 1000 mL (PYREX).

steps.title: Add a magnetic stirrer and put...
steps.instruction: Add a magnetic stirrer and put on Fisher Thermix Stiring hotplate at 60 °C .

steps.title: Measure 1000 mL of distilled water
steps.instruction: Measure 1000 mL of distilled water.

steps.title: Mix all in Erlenmeyer flask 1000 mL (PYREX)
steps.instruction: Mix all in Erlenmeyer flask 1000 mL (PYREX).

steps.title: Add a magnetic stirrer and put...
steps.instruction: Add a magnetic stirrer and put on Fisher Thermix Stiring hotplate at 60 °C .

steps.title: Allow mixture to be cleared and free of particles
steps.instruction: Allow mixture to be cleared and free of particles.

steps.title: Distribute 75 mL into 125 mL Erlenmeyer flask (PYREX)
steps.instruction: Distribute 75 mL into 125 mL Erlenmeyer flask (PYREX).

steps.title: Cover with cotton plugs and seal with aluminum foil
steps.instruction: Cover with cotton plugs and seal with aluminum foil.

steps.title: Process symptomatic needles within three days of field collection
steps.instruction: Process symptomatic needles within three days of field collection.

steps.title: Remove 4-5 needles strands from samples
steps.instruction: Remove 4-5 needles strands from samples.

steps.title: Cut needles into 3-4 cm pieces
steps.instruction: Cut needles into 3-4 cm pieces.

steps.title: Pore inside a beaker and guide by white cheese clothes
steps.instruction: Pore inside a beaker and guide by white cheese clothes.

steps.title: Dip the clothes containing needles in 7
steps.instruction: Dip the clothes containing needles in 7.5% sodium hypochlorite for 00:00:30 .

steps.title: Rinse with distilled water for 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Rinse with distilled water for 00:00:30 .

steps.title: Wash again with 70% ethanol for...
steps.instruction: Wash again with 70% ethanol for 00:00:30 (Barnes et al 2014).

steps.title: Rinse with distilled water for 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Rinse with distilled water for 00:00:30 .

steps.title: Place the cloth with needles aside and allow to dry
steps.instruction: Place the cloth with needles aside and allow to dry.

steps.title: In an aseptic environment, place the...
steps.instruction: In an aseptic environment, place the cleaned needles on the petri dishes with media.

steps.title: Prepare each sample in four replicates
steps.instruction: Prepare each sample in four replicates.

steps.title: Seal plate with parafilm
steps.instruction: Seal plate with parafilm.

steps.title: Arrange plates in a tray and...
steps.instruction: Arrange plates in a tray and allow it to grow at 37 °C .

steps.title: Check plates for sporulation and growth weekly
steps.instruction: Check plates for sporulation and growth weekly.

steps.title: Identify distinct colonies grown around the...
steps.instruction: Identify distinct colonies grown around the needles from the previous step.

steps.title: Scrape the edge of each colony...
steps.instruction: Scrape the edge of each colony into a small media plate (petri dishes 60mm).

steps.title: Seal plate with parafilm
steps.instruction: Seal plate with parafilm.

steps.title: Scrape tip of the pure fungal colony using forceps
steps.instruction: Scrape tip of the pure fungal colony using forceps.

steps.title: Inoculate pure fungal culture on liquid...
steps.instruction: Inoculate pure fungal culture on liquid broth in the 125 mL Erlenmeyer flasks.

steps.title: Seal with cotton plug and aluminum foil
steps.instruction: Seal with cotton plug and aluminum foil.

steps.title: Set the Room temperature to 37 °C
steps.instruction: Set the Room temperature to 37 °C .

steps.title: Label sample accordingly
steps.instruction: Label sample accordingly.

steps.title: Harvest mycelia after one to two...
steps.instruction: Harvest mycelia after one to two weeks of incubation in media broth.

steps.title: Transfer the mycelia to sterilized 50 mL falcon tubes
steps.instruction: Transfer the mycelia to sterilized 50 mL falcon tubes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 x g, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 x g, °C, 5 minutes with Thermoscientifc multifuge X pro series.

steps.title: Remove supernatant media
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant media.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of 1X phosphate-buffered saline (PBS, pH 7
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of 1X phosphate-buffered saline (PBS, pH 7.5) .

steps.title: Mix vigorously by vortexing
steps.instruction: Mix vigorously by vortexing.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 x g, °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 x g, °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Repeat wash until clean mycelial pellets...
steps.instruction: Repeat wash until clean mycelial pellets is obtained, effectively removing media residues.

steps.title: Prepare sorbitol wash buffer (Inglis et al
steps.instruction: Prepare sorbitol wash buffer (Inglis et al., 2018) A B C D 1 Final concentration Stock For 1L 2 Tris-HCl pH 8.0 100 mM 1 M 100 mL 3 Sorbitol 0.35 M Powder 63.76 g 4 EDTA 5 mM 0.5 M 10 mL 5 PVP-40 1% Powder 10 g

steps.title: Mix all reagent in Erlenmeyer flask...
steps.instruction: Mix all reagent in Erlenmeyer flask 1000mL (PYREX) with magnetic stirrer.

steps.title: Add magnetic stirrer and place on...
steps.instruction: Add magnetic stirrer and place on Fisher Thermix Stiring hotplate on 60 °C .

steps.title: Allow the mixture to be thoroughly dissolved without any particles
steps.instruction: Allow the mixture to be thoroughly dissolved without any particles.

steps.title: Immediately before use, mix 10 µL...
steps.instruction: Immediately before use, mix 10 µL of β-Mercaptoethanol (β-ME) (Lot no 23F2056260) to each mL of sorbitol buffer (1% v/v), now referred as SWB-βME.

steps.title: Weigh Approximately 200 mg – 300 mg of fungal mycelia
steps.instruction: Weigh Approximately 200 mg – 300 mg of fungal mycelia.

steps.title: Transfer into a 2 mL screw-cap tube
steps.instruction: Transfer into a 2 mL screw-cap tube.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of the prepared SWB-βME solution
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of the prepared SWB-βME solution. Prepare mastermix for easy pipetting.

steps.title: Add a beating bead to each sample
steps.instruction: Add a beating bead to each sample.

steps.title: Disrupt the cell using a precellys...
steps.instruction: Disrupt the cell using a precellys at 9100 RPM for three cycles of 00:00:30 each, with 5-second pauses between each cycle.

steps.title: Centrifuge homogenized mixtures at 17000 x g, °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge homogenized mixtures at 17000 x g, °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Repeat the process until it is...
steps.instruction: Repeat the process until it is clean, particularly for sticky mycelial pellets that failed to settle.

steps.title: Prepare 3% CTAB buffer (Schenk et al
steps.instruction: Prepare 3% CTAB buffer (Schenk et al., 2023) A B C D 1 Final concentration Stock concentration 1L 2 Tris-HCl pH 8.0 100 mM 1 M 100 mL 3 CTAB 3% Powder 30 g 4 NaCl 1.4 M Powder / 5 M 81.9 g / 280 mL 5 EDTA 20 mM 0.5 M 40 mL 6 PVP-40 10 g/L Powder 10 g

steps.title: Add a magnetic stirrer and put...
steps.instruction: Add a magnetic stirrer and put on Fisher Thermix Stiring hotplate on 60 °C .

steps.title: Mix all reagent in Erlenmeyer flask 1000mL with magnetic stirrer
steps.instruction: Mix all reagent in Erlenmeyer flask 1000mL with magnetic stirrer.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of 3% CTAB...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of 3% CTAB buffer to sorbitol washed mycelia.

steps.title: Add 15 µL of β-ME
steps.instruction: Add 15 µL of β-ME.

steps.title: Add 15 µL of proteinase K (20 μg/μl)
steps.instruction: Add 15 µL of proteinase K (20 μg/μl).

steps.title: Disrupt the cell again using a...
steps.instruction: Disrupt the cell again using a precellys at 9100 RPM for three cycles of 00:00:30 each, with 5-second pauses between each cycle. Prepare mastermix for easy pipetting.

steps.title: Incubate mixture for 03:00:00 on a...
steps.instruction: Incubate mixture for 03:00:00 on a Incubating microplate shaker (VWR) at 65 °C .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 17000 x g, Room temperature, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 17000 x g, Room temperature, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant into a 2ul new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant into a 2ul new tube.

steps.title: Add equal volume of phenol-chloroform-isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1)
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of phenol-chloroform-isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1).

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 17000 x g, °C, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 17000 x g, °C, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Transfer upper phase to a fresh 2ul tube
steps.instruction: Transfer upper phase to a fresh 2ul tube.

steps.title: Add equal volume of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1)
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1).

steps.title: Incubate for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 17000 x g, °C, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 17000 x g, °C, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Remove the resulting supernatant to a new tube
steps.instruction: Remove the resulting supernatant to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 100 μg/μl RNase A ( 5 µL )
steps.instruction: Add 100 μg/μl RNase A ( 5 µL ).

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.2 volumes of 10 Molarity (M) ammonium acetate (NH 4 Ac) and 0.8 volumes of ice-cold 100% isopropanol to RNase treated mixture.

steps.title: Incubate at -20 °C Overnight , to precipitate the DNA
steps.instruction: Incubate at -20 °C Overnight , to precipitate the DNA.

steps.title: Remove residual liquid using a pipette
steps.instruction: Remove residual liquid using a pipette.

steps.title: Resuspend DNA in nuclease-free water (...
steps.instruction: Resuspend DNA in nuclease-free water ( 50 µL - 100 µL ).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 17000 x g, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 17000 x g, °C, 10 minutes to pellet the DNA.

steps.title: Wash pellets with 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash pellets with 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Repeat the wash
steps.instruction: Repeat the wash.

description: Store at 4 °C . Notes: All prepared buffers can be stored in 20°C except CTAB. β-Mercaptoethanol should be stored in flammable cabinet
